seoTitle: Upper Capel vs Upper Murray — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Capel and Upper Murray. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Capel vs Upper Murray: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Capel and Upper Murray.
heading: Upper Capel vs Upper Murray — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Capel, Western Australia and Upper Murray, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Capel has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Upper Murray (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Capel or Upper Murray safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Capel has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Upper Murray scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Capel scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Murray scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Capel or Upper Murray?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Capel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
